required_preferences.fact: Keeps Slack and email notifications on at all times during work hours — prioritizes instant response and real-time coordination over focused solo analysis

supersedes.fact: Shuts off Slack and email notifications during focused data analysis — only checks messages between tasks

required_preferences.fact: Performs CPAP setup routine and machine checks nightly before bed — uses guided meditation apps only if time allows after equipment setup

supersedes.fact: Uses guided meditation apps for insomnia every night — never skips, even when tired

required_preferences.fact: Maintains a CPAP usage and sleep quality journal, recording hours of use and any discomfort nightly for her doctor’s follow-ups
Checks local pollen and air quality alerts twice daily—morning and evening—to track potential symptom triggers and adjust routines accordingly
Composes a handwritten daily gratitude note each night before sleep — never uses digital journaling apps
Declines evening social invitations and limits late-night activities to ensure she’s home for Luna’s evening medication and fluid treatments

persona: A mid-level business analyst at a multinational retail corporation
